data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Guarantees privacy and security through robust encryption methods.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS 1.2+ for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Secure Access Control
data.description: Implements strict user authentication methods to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Uses OAuth 2.0 and two-factor authentication for securing user accounts.

data.title: Threat Monitoring and Response
data.description: Continuous monitoring for threats using advanced AI-driven tools.
data.technical_spec: Leverages AWS GuardDuty and Custom SIEM systems.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent security checks and audits to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engages third-party security firms for independent assessments.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates Distributed Denial of Service attacks using advanced defense mechanisms.
data.technical_spec: Employs AWS Shield Advanced for comprehensive DDoS mitigation.
